response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and platforms, but lacks the mandatory 5–10 years of strong C++ development experience on Windows systems. While they have worked with C and C++ components in past roles, their primary focus has been on other languages (e.g., TypeScript, Node.js, D, JavaScript). Additionally, there is no clear evidence of domain expertise in capital markets, investment banking, or fixed-income systems, which are critical for this role.
strengths: Strong software development fundamentals with diverse language experience (C, C++, Java, JavaScript, TypeScript, Python)
Proven ability to work in financial-services-adjacent environments (RIDE Capital, re:cinq)
Excellent communication skills demonstrated through workshops, talks, and open-source contributions
concerns: Lacks the required 5–10 years of strong C++ experience on Windows platform (primary focus on other languages)
No explicit domain expertise in capital markets, investment banking, or fixed income
Limited experience with SQL Server or Oracle (only mentions generic SQL and MongoDB)
